name: Hokuriku Electrical Construction Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hokuriku Electrical Construction Co.,Ltd. engages in the construction business in Japan. The company undertakes electrical contracting, ventilating and air conditioning, telecommunication, plumbing, firefighting facility, and steel structure works. It also offers offers electrical, steam, and other energy related services; and sells, leases, and manages real estate properties. The company was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Toyama, Japan.
